india_trends.title: Stock Trader’s Guide to Navigating High Stakes Trump-Xi Talks
india_trends.summary: Investors are looking for further signs of easing tensions between President Donald Trump and his counterpart Xi Jinping to help remove an overhang on Chinese markets, with geopolitical and trade issues in focus.

india_trends.title: Banks and Crypto Backers Tussle as Senators Eye Landmark Digital Asset Bill
india_trends.summary: Banking groups are floating last-minute changes to a compromise on stablecoin yield as a key Senate panel begins considering a landmark digital asset bill.

india_trends.title: BS7 norms may finally end diesel's last stronghold in Indian SUVs
india_trends.summary: Diesel engines remain popular for Indian SUVs, offering torque and efficiency for long drives. However, upcoming BS7 emission standards will significantly increase costs. This could force buyers to reconsider diesel, potentially shifting them towards CNG, hybrid, or electric vehicles. Automakers are

india_trends.title: India’s retirees are choosing keys over deeds in a quiet housing shift
india_trends.summary: India's senior living sector is changing. Seniors are now renting homes instead of buying them. This trend is fueled by longer lifespans and smaller families. Experts say this rental model helps seniors keep their savings and stay flexible. Developers are embracing this shift, offering better qualit

india_trends.title: Ashok Kumar Panda takes charge as SAIL Chairman and MD
india_trends.summary: Ashok Kumar Panda is the new Chairman and Managing Director of SAIL. He previously served as Director (Finance) and Director (Commercial). india_trends.title: Around 20 metric tonnes of honey from Assam exported to US
india_trends.summary: The first consignment of One District One Product honey from Assam's Baksa district has been exported to the United States. This initiative, supported by APEDA, aims to boost farmer incomes and rural livelihoods. The high-quality honey is known for its purity.

india_trends.summary: Birla Corporation witnessed a robust financial performance, with its March-ended quarter net profit soaring 15% year-on-year to Rs 295 crore. india_trends.summary: Indian stock markets experienced a significant downturn on Friday. Geopolitical tensions between the US and Iran, a weakening rupee, and widespread selling in financial stocks contributed to the decline. Auto and energy sectors also saw major losses.
